_comment: vsafe.py protection config. Globs are matched (case-sensitive) against the ABSOLUTE, resolved path of every candidate file. Absolute globs (starting with /) match literally; relative globs (starting with ** or *) match anywhere in the path. headroom multiplies the estimated output size for the render disk preflight. media_exts decides what gets routed to .vtrash instead of unlink. master_re groups files for prune by stripping a trailing -v<N> before the extension.
